user_message: Give me the manager view on this Consolidated Messenger escalation email. Board meeting is next week.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Sarah Singh <sarah.singh@consolidated.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-18 16:52 EST
Subject: URGENT: security posture Issue at Consolidated Messenger

Our team encountered some challenges with security posture. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Sarah Singh <sarah.singh@consolidated.com>
Date: 2024-02-06 08:09 EST
Subject: security posture - Action Required

There's been a change in our timeline for security posture. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Sarah Singh <sarah.singh@consolidated.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-18 11:14 EST
Subject: URGENT: security posture Issue at Consolidated Messenger

There's been a change in our timeline for security posture. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Consolidated Messenger: the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades

handoffs.condition: contact and opportunity records need updating

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF38-I trap (Stakeholder map delta misses authority shift); produces complete Stakeholder map delta, opportunity-at-risk assessment, re-engagement plan, contact update proposals,
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF38-I failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF38-I failure mode (Stakeholder map delta misses authority shift)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct security posture decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF38-I -- Stakeholder map delta misses authority shift
